items.title: 🤖 GPT-5.6 一小时完成 50 年图论猜想证明
items.title_zh: GPT-5.6 一小时解决五十年图论难题
items.title_en: GPT-5.6 Solves 50-Year Graph Theory Conjecture in One Hour
items.summary: GPT-5.6 autonomously proved the cycle double cover conjecture, a long-standing graph theory problem, in under an hour using parallel sub-agents.

items.title: Old and new apps, via modern coding agents
items.title_zh: 陶哲轩用LLM构建应用与可视化
items.title_en: Terry Tao Uses LLMs to Build Apps and Visualizations
items.summary: Terry Tao uses modern coding agents (LLMs) to build visualizations and apps, illustrating the vast potential of AI-assisted software development beyond traditional domains.

items.title: 全球首款侵入式脑机接口医疗器械获批上市  国家药监局近日批准博睿康医疗科技（上海）有限公司“植入式脑机接口手部运动功能代偿系统”创新产品注册申请，标志着国际首个
items.title_zh: 全球首款侵入式脑机接口医疗器械获批
items.title_en: World's First Invasive BCI Medical Device Approved
items.summary: China's NMPA approved the world's first invasive brain-computer interface medical device for hand motor function compensation in quadriplegic patients.

items.title: Claude Code sends 33k tokens before reading the prompt; OpenCode sends 7k
items.title_zh: Claude Code 相同任务消耗33k tokens，OpenCode仅7k
items.title_en: Claude Code uses 33k tokens vs OpenCode's 7k for same task
items.summary: A study shows Claude Code sends significantly more tokens than OpenCode for the same tasks due to inefficient caching and harness overhead.

items.title: I love LLMs, I hate hype
items.title_zh: George Hotz：LLMs有价值，但前沿实验室无法捕获价值
items.title_en: George Hotz: LLMs Valued but Value Won't Be Captured by Frontier Labs
items.summary: George Hotz argues that while LLMs are valuable, frontier labs won't capture the value they create, criticizing the hype and discussing implications for open source.

items.title: The shingles vaccine may reduce the risk of dementia
items.title_zh: 带状疱疹疫苗或可降低痴呆风险
items.title_en: Shingles Vaccine May Reduce Dementia Risk
items.summary: The Economist article reports that the shingles vaccine may reduce dementia risk, supported by a UK study with hard age cutoff evidence, though some commenters caution about potential spurious correlations.

items.title: Ghostel.el: Terminal emulator powered by libghostty
items.title_zh: Ghostel.el：基于 libghostty 的快速 Emacs 终端模拟器
items.title_en: Ghostel.el: Fast Emacs terminal emulator powered by libghostty
items.summary: Ghostel.el is a new, faster terminal emulator for Emacs built on libghostty, addressing long-standing performance issues.

items.title: 🤖 研究员称 xAI Grok CLI 默认上传整个代码库及密钥文件
items.title_zh: xAI Grok CLI 默认上传整个代码库及密钥文件
items.title_en: xAI Grok CLI Uploads Entire Codebase and Secrets by Default
items.summary: Security researchers discovered that xAI's Grok CLI (v0.2.93) uploads entire codebases and sensitive files by default, with no effective opt-out.
